calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Stephen A. Fraser, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Marin Management, Inc.
John Manderfeld, President of Marin Management, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Prime West Development, LLC.
Default was entered against defendant on June 29, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 25, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Marin Management, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Prime West Development, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $71,333.25.
Prejudgment Interest - Reserved.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $390.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $74,548.25.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
